steps.title: Connect familiarity to preference
steps.content: The explanation offered is that military service familiarizes people with organizational structures also found in civilian government bureaucracy. That familiarity would help explain why veterans are overrepresented in civilian government jobs.

steps.title: Reject wrong directions
steps.content: Choice B refers to a typical relationship the text never establishes. Choice C shifts to nonveterans considering military service. Choice D claims the jobs require military experience, which is not stated. Familiarity instead makes those jobs especially appealing to veterans. The answer is A.
